name: github-local-ops
description: Local GitHub workflows for repos, PRs, issues, Actions, releases, publishing, and identity-aware pushes, backed by gh and git.

interface.longDescription: Use local GitHub CLI authentication and local-only identity rules to inspect repositories, triage pull requests, debug Actions checks, handle review feedback, manage issues and releases, and prepare code changes for review. Includes readiness checks, identity fix previews, identity-aware pushes, and preview-first public writes with explicit approval before execution.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this PR and its checks
